features: 【Metal Smooth Finish】 These bobby pins are made with fashionable metal plating, pick up light and color matches your hair perfectly! These bobby pins are not faded and rust resistant. Color hairpin: The color of the plating is fashionable and it is not easy to peel off.
【User-Friendly Design】 Bobby Pins don’t pull or snag on your hair because of the nice thick rubber tip coating. Comfortable to wear and easy to remove without pulling out hair.

【Occasion】Bobby pins fit for all Hair Types: Curly Hair, Long Hair, Short Hair, Thin Hair, Wavy. Suitable for daily wearings, activewear, business, casual, christening, party/cocktail, travel, Wedding, workwear.
【High Quality】 Made of good quality metal, these bobby pins blend well into your hair and don’t snap or break easily. The strength and sturdiness of the pins are good for repeated use.

【Pack in box】 Bobby Pins are stored in a box, convenient to store and pick, well organize these bulk of hair pins as they tend to get lost easily. 200 Counts hair pins are enough for your spare and replacement in daily.
